# Evidence Engine Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Add an "Evidence Capture" step to the storyboard and an "Outcomes & Evidence" dashboard tab that demonstrates how screening data from patient support calls becomes population-level evidence for outcomes-based payer contracting.

**Architecture:** All data is client-side seed data generated by deterministic PRNG — no backend changes. New types in `types.ts`, cohort generation in `seed-data.ts`, UI in `dashboard/page.tsx`. The SVG trajectory chart is hand-rolled (no chart library) to match the existing codebase pattern of inline CSS/HTML visualization.

**Tech Stack:** Next.js (React), TypeScript, Vitest, Tailwind utility classes + inline PX design tokens.

**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-18-evidence-engine-design.md`

---

## File Map

| File | Action | Responsibility |
|------|--------|---------------|
| `frontend/src/app/lib/types.ts` | Modify | Extend `ScreeningInstrumentId`, add 5 new types |
| `frontend/src/app/lib/types.test.ts` | Modify | Type compilation checks for new types |
| `frontend/src/app/lib/seed-data.ts` | Modify | Cohort data generation, 3 new exports |
| `frontend/src/app/lib/seed-data.test.ts` | Modify | Tests for cohort data shape and invariants |
| `frontend/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx` | Modify | Tab type, TAB_ITEMS, storyboard Step 5, Outcomes & Evidence tab, contract simulator |

All changes in existing files. No new files created.

```ts
// Add to existing type imports at top of file:
import type {
  // ... existing imports ...
  OutcomeTimepoint,
  PatientOutcomeRecord,
  CohortTimepointStats,
  CohortOutcomeData,
  PayerEvidenceCard,
} from './types';

// Add new describe block:
describe('Evidence Engine types', () => {
  it('OutcomeTimepoint includes all timepoints', () => {
    const tp: OutcomeTimepoint[] = ['baseline', '30d', '60d', '90d'];
    expect(tp).toHaveLength(4);
  });

  it('PatientOutcomeRecord shape is valid', () => {
    const record: PatientOutcomeRecord = {
      patientId: 'P-001',
      therapeuticArea: 'essential-tremor',
      drugProduct: 'euloxacaltenamide',
      enrolledAt: '2026-01-15',
      tetrasScores: { baseline: 6, '30d': 4 },
      mmasScores: { '30d': 1 },
      persistedAt90d: true,
      aeReported: false,
      seriousAeReported: false,
    };
    expect(record.patientId).toBe('P-001');
  });

  it('CohortOutcomeData persistenceRate excludes baseline', () => {
    const data: CohortOutcomeData = {
      therapeuticArea: 'essential-tremor',
      drugProduct: 'euloxacaltenamide',
      instrumentId: 'TETRAS-LITE',
      instrumentLabel: 'TETRAS-LITE',
      totalEnrolled: 437,
      trajectory: [],
      persistenceRate: { '30d': 0.93, '60d': 0.86, '90d': 0.79 },
      aeIncidenceRate: 0.121,
    };
    expect(data.persistenceRate).not.toHaveProperty('baseline');
  });

  it('ScreeningInstrumentId accepts TETRAS-LITE and MMAS-4', () => {
    const ids: ScreeningInstrumentId[] = [
      'AE-SCREEN', 'ADHERENCE-CHECK', 'DOSING-VERIFY', 'SWITCH-ASSESS',
      'AE-TRIAGE', 'C-SSRS-LITE', 'TETRAS-LITE', 'MMAS-4',
    ];
    expect(ids).toContain('TETRAS-LITE');
    expect(ids).toContain('MMAS-4');
  });
});
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Add new types**

Append after the last type in `types.ts` (after the `AnalyticsResponse` interface, line ~341):

```ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Evidence Engine -- outcome tracking for payer contracting
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
export type OutcomeTimepoint = 'baseline' | '30d' | '60d' | '90d';

export interface PatientOutcomeRecord {
  patientId: string;
  therapeuticArea: TherapeuticArea;
  drugProduct: DrugProduct;
  enrolledAt: string;
  tetrasScores: Partial<Record<OutcomeTimepoint, number>>;
  mmasScores: Partial<Record<OutcomeTimepoint, number>>;
  persistedAt90d: boolean;
  aeReported: boolean;
  seriousAeReported: boolean;
}

export interface CohortTimepointStats {
  timepoint: OutcomeTimepoint;
  n: number;
  mean: number;
  median: number;
  stdDev: number;
  ci95Lower: number;
  ci95Upper: number;
  percentImprovedFromBaseline: number;
}

export interface CohortOutcomeData {
  therapeuticArea: TherapeuticArea;
  drugProduct: DrugProduct;
  instrumentId: 'TETRAS-LITE' | 'MMAS-4';
  instrumentLabel: string;
  totalEnrolled: number;
  trajectory: CohortTimepointStats[];
  persistenceRate: Record<Exclude<OutcomeTimepoint, 'baseline'>, number>;
  aeIncidenceRate: number;
}

export interface PayerEvidenceCard {
  generatedAt: string;
  cohortSize: number;
  meanBaselineScore: number;
  mean90dScore: number;
  meanImprovementPct: number;
  ci95: [number, number];
  persistenceRate90d: number;
  adherenceRate90d: number;
  aeRate: number;
  seriousAeRate: number;
  headline: string;
}
```

- [ ] **Step 1: Write tests for cohort data**

Add to `seed-data.test.ts`:

```ts
// Add to imports at top:
import {
  // ... existing imports ...
  getPatientOutcomes,
  getCohortOutcomeData,
  getPayerEvidenceCard,
} from './seed-data';
import type {
  // ... existing imports ...
  PatientOutcomeRecord,
  CohortOutcomeData,
  PayerEvidenceCard,
} from './types';

// Add new describe blocks:
describe('getPatientOutcomes (evidence engine)', () => {
  let patients: PatientOutcomeRecord[];

  beforeAll(() => {
    patients = getPatientOutcomes();
  });

  it('returns 437 patients', () => {
    expect(patients).toHaveLength(437);
  });

  it('all patients have baseline TETRAS scores', () => {
    for (const p of patients) {
      expect(p.tetrasScores.baseline).toBeDefined();
      expect(p.tetrasScores.baseline).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0);
      expect(p.tetrasScores.baseline).toBeLessThanOrEqual(8);
    }
  });

  it('patients who persisted at 90d have 90d scores', () => {
    const persisted = patients.filter(p => p.persistedAt90d);
    for (const p of persisted) {
      expect(p.tetrasScores['90d']).toBeDefined();
    }
  });

  it('patients who dropped out before 90d have no 90d scores', () => {
    const dropped = patients.filter(p => !p.persistedAt90d);
    for (const p of dropped) {
      expect(p.tetrasScores['90d']).toBeUndefined();
    }
  });

  it('TETRAS scores are integers 0-8', () => {
    for (const p of patients) {
      for (const tp of ['baseline', '30d', '60d', '90d'] as const) {
        const score = p.tetrasScores[tp];
        if (score !== undefined) {
          expect(Number.isInteger(score)).toBe(true);
          expect(score).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0);
          expect(score).toBeLessThanOrEqual(8);
        }
      }
    }
  });

  it('seriousAeReported is a subset of aeReported', () => {
    const serious = patients.filter(p => p.seriousAeReported);
    for (const p of serious) {
      expect(p.aeReported).toBe(true);
    }
  });

  it('all patients are ET / ELEX', () => {
    for (const p of patients) {
      expect(p.therapeuticArea).toBe('essential-tremor');
      expect(p.drugProduct).toBe('euloxacaltenamide');
    }
  });
});

describe('getCohortOutcomeData', () => {
  let cohort: CohortOutcomeData;

  beforeAll(() => {
    cohort = getCohortOutcomeData();
  });

  it('has 4 trajectory timepoints', () => {
    expect(cohort.trajectory).toHaveLength(4);
    expect(cohort.trajectory.map(t => t.timepoint)).toEqual(['baseline', '30d', '60d', '90d']);
  });

  it('n decreases over time (persistence)', () => {
    const ns = cohort.trajectory.map(t => t.n);
    for (let i = 1; i < ns.length; i++) {
      expect(ns[i]).toBeLessThanOrEqual(ns[i - 1]);
    }
  });

  it('mean TETRAS score decreases over time (improvement)', () => {
    const means = cohort.trajectory.map(t => t.mean);
    for (let i = 1; i < means.length; i++) {
      expect(means[i]).toBeLessThan(means[i - 1]);
    }
  });

  it('CI band narrows over time', () => {
    const widths = cohort.trajectory.map(t => t.ci95Upper - t.ci95Lower);
    // baseline may be wider than 30d due to n, but 60d and 90d should narrow
    expect(widths[3]).toBeLessThanOrEqual(widths[1]);
  });

  it('persistence rates are between 0 and 1', () => {
    for (const tp of ['30d', '60d', '90d'] as const) {
      expect(cohort.persistenceRate[tp]).toBeGreaterThan(0);
      expect(cohort.persistenceRate[tp]).toBeLessThanOrEqual(1);
    }
  });

  it('persistence rates decrease over time', () => {
    expect(cohort.persistenceRate['60d']).toBeLessThan(cohort.persistenceRate['30d']);
    expect(cohort.persistenceRate['90d']).toBeLessThan(cohort.persistenceRate['60d']);
  });
});

describe('getPayerEvidenceCard', () => {
  let card: PayerEvidenceCard;

  beforeAll(() => {
    card = getPayerEvidenceCard();
  });

  it('cohort size is 437', () => {
    expect(card.cohortSize).toBe(437);
  });

  it('improvement is positive (lower score = better)', () => {
    expect(card.meanImprovementPct).toBeGreaterThan(0);
  });

  it('90d score is lower than baseline', () => {
    expect(card.mean90dScore).toBeLessThan(card.meanBaselineScore);
  });

  it('CI is a tuple of two numbers', () => {
    expect(card.ci95).toHaveLength(2);
    expect(card.ci95[0]).toBeLessThan(card.ci95[1]);
  });

  it('rates are between 0 and 1', () => {
    expect(card.persistenceRate90d).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    expect(card.persistenceRate90d).toBeLessThanOrEqual(1);
    expect(card.adherenceRate90d).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    expect(card.adherenceRate90d).toBeLessThanOrEqual(1);
    expect(card.aeRate).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    expect(card.aeRate).toBeLessThan(1);
    expect(card.seriousAeRate).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    expect(card.seriousAeRate).toBeLessThan(card.aeRate);
  });

  it('headline is a non-empty string', () => {
    expect(card.headline.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
  });
});
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Implement cohort generation**

Append to `seed-data.ts` after line 1340 (the end of `buildSignalFeed`). Uses the existing `rng` PRNG, `pick`, `randInt` helpers already in the file.

```ts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Evidence Engine -- Cohort outcome data (ET / ELEX / TETRAS-LITE)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
import type {
  OutcomeTimepoint,
  PatientOutcomeRecord,
  CohortTimepointStats,
  CohortOutcomeData,
  PayerEvidenceCard,
} from './types';
// NOTE: This import block must be merged into the existing imports at top of file.

const COHORT_SIZE = 437;

// Box-Muller transform for normal distribution using existing rng
function normalRng(mean: number, sd: number): number {
  const u1 = rng();
  const u2 = rng();
  const z = Math.sqrt(-2 * Math.log(u1 || 0.0001)) * Math.cos(2 * Math.PI * u2);
  return mean + z * sd;
}

function clamp(val: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, val));
}

// Generate 437 patient outcome records
function generatePatientOutcomes(): PatientOutcomeRecord[] {
  const patients: PatientOutcomeRecord[] = [];
  const startDate = new Date('2025-09-15');

  // Improvement multipliers per timepoint (cumulative effect)
  const improvementTargets: Record<string, { mean: number; sd: number }> = {
    '30d': { mean: 0.22, sd: 0.15 },
    '60d': { mean: 0.31, sd: 0.12 },
    '90d': { mean: 0.36, sd: 0.10 },
  };

  // Dropout probability at each timepoint (cumulative)
  const dropoutCumulative = { '30d': 0.07, '60d': 0.14, '90d': 0.21 };

  for (let i = 0; i < COHORT_SIZE; i++) {
    const enrollDayOffset = Math.floor(rng() * 180); // spread across 6 months
    const enrollDate = new Date(startDate.getTime() + enrollDayOffset * 86400000);
    const baseline = Math.round(clamp(normalRng(5.5, 1.2), 1, 8));

    const tetrasScores: Partial<Record<OutcomeTimepoint, number>> = { baseline };
    const mmasScores: Partial<Record<OutcomeTimepoint, number>> = {};
    let persisted = true;

    for (const tp of ['30d', '60d', '90d'] as const) {
      if (!persisted) break;

      // Check dropout (biased toward patients with less improvement)
      const cumDrop = dropoutCumulative[tp];
      const prevTp = tp === '30d' ? 'baseline' : tp === '60d' ? '30d' : '60d';
      const prevScore = tetrasScores[prevTp] ?? baseline;
      const improvementSoFar = (baseline - prevScore) / baseline;
      // Less improvement = higher dropout probability
      const dropBias = 1 + (1 - improvementSoFar) * 0.5;
      const dropProb = tp === '30d' ? cumDrop : (cumDrop - dropoutCumulative[prevTp === 'baseline' ? '30d' : prevTp]);
      if (rng() < dropProb * dropBias) {
        persisted = false;
        break;
      }

      // Generate TETRAS score
      const target = improvementTargets[tp];
      const improvementFactor = clamp(normalRng(target.mean, target.sd), -0.05, 0.65);
      const newScore = Math.round(clamp(baseline * (1 - improvementFactor), 0, 8));
      tetrasScores[tp] = newScore;

      // Generate MMAS-4 score (0 = fully adherent, 4 = non-adherent)
      const adherenceRates: Record<string, number> = { '30d': 0.81, '60d': 0.76, '90d': 0.71 };
      mmasScores[tp] = rng() < adherenceRates[tp] ? 0 : Math.round(clamp(normalRng(1.5, 0.8), 1, 4));
    }

    const aeReported = rng() < 0.12;
    const seriousAeReported = aeReported && rng() < 0.19;

    patients.push({
      patientId: `EV-${String(i + 1).padStart(4, '0')}`,
      therapeuticArea: 'essential-tremor',
      drugProduct: 'euloxacaltenamide',
      enrolledAt: enrollDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      tetrasScores,
      mmasScores,
      persistedAt90d: persisted,
      aeReported,
      seriousAeReported,
    });
  }

  return patients;
}

// Compute cohort stats from raw patient data
function computeCohortStats(patients: PatientOutcomeRecord[]): CohortOutcomeData {
  const timepoints: OutcomeTimepoint[] = ['baseline', '30d', '60d', '90d'];
  const baselineScores = patients.map(p => p.tetrasScores.baseline!);
  const baselineMean = baselineScores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / baselineScores.length;

  const trajectory: CohortTimepointStats[] = timepoints.map(tp => {
    const scores = patients
      .map(p => p.tetrasScores[tp])
      .filter((s): s is number => s !== undefined);
    const n = scores.length;
    const mean = scores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / n;
    const sorted = [...scores].sort((a, b) => a - b);
    const median = n % 2 === 0
      ? (sorted[n / 2 - 1] + sorted[n / 2]) / 2
      : sorted[Math.floor(n / 2)];
    const variance = scores.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s - mean) ** 2, 0) / (n - 1);
    const stdDev = Math.sqrt(variance);
    const se = stdDev / Math.sqrt(n);
    const patientsWithTp = patients.filter(p => p.tetrasScores[tp] !== undefined);
    const improved = tp === 'baseline' ? 0 : patientsWithTp.filter(p => {
      const bl = p.tetrasScores.baseline!;
      const sc = p.tetrasScores[tp]!;
      return sc < bl;
    }).length;

    return {
      timepoint: tp,
      n,
      mean: Math.round(mean * 100) / 100,
      median: Math.round(median * 100) / 100,
      stdDev: Math.round(stdDev * 100) / 100,
      ci95Lower: Math.round((mean - 1.96 * se) * 100) / 100,
      ci95Upper: Math.round((mean + 1.96 * se) * 100) / 100,
      percentImprovedFromBaseline: tp === 'baseline' ? 0 :
        Math.round((improved / patientsWithTp.length) * 10000) / 100,
    };
  });

  const persistedAt30 = patients.filter(p => p.tetrasScores['30d'] !== undefined).length;
  const persistedAt60 = patients.filter(p => p.tetrasScores['60d'] !== undefined).length;
  const persistedAt90 = patients.filter(p => p.tetrasScores['90d'] !== undefined).length;

  return {
    therapeuticArea: 'essential-tremor',
    drugProduct: 'euloxacaltenamide',
    instrumentId: 'TETRAS-LITE',
    instrumentLabel: 'TETRAS Performance — Lite Assessment',
    totalEnrolled: patients.length,
    trajectory,
    persistenceRate: {
      '30d': Math.round((persistedAt30 / patients.length) * 1000) / 1000,
      '60d': Math.round((persistedAt60 / patients.length) * 1000) / 1000,
      '90d': Math.round((persistedAt90 / patients.length) * 1000) / 1000,
    },
    aeIncidenceRate: Math.round((patients.filter(p => p.aeReported).length / patients.length) * 1000) / 1000,
  };
}

function computePayerCard(patients: PatientOutcomeRecord[], cohort: CohortOutcomeData): PayerEvidenceCard {
  const bl = cohort.trajectory.find(t => t.timepoint === 'baseline')!;
  const d90 = cohort.trajectory.find(t => t.timepoint === '90d')!;

  // Compute point estimate AND CI from the same eligible patient set
  // (patients with both baseline and 90d scores). This ensures the CI brackets its own point estimate.
  const eligible = patients.filter(p => p.tetrasScores.baseline !== undefined && p.tetrasScores['90d'] !== undefined);
  const improvements = eligible.map(p => (p.tetrasScores.baseline! - p.tetrasScores['90d']!) / p.tetrasScores.baseline!);
  const meanImpr = improvements.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / improvements.length;
  const improvementPct = Math.round(meanImpr * 1000) / 10;
  const variance = improvements.reduce((sum, v) => sum + (v - meanImpr) ** 2, 0) / (improvements.length - 1);
  const se = Math.sqrt(variance) / Math.sqrt(improvements.length);
  const ciLower = Math.round((meanImpr - 1.96 * se) * 1000) / 10;
  const ciUpper = Math.round((meanImpr + 1.96 * se) * 1000) / 10;

  // Adherence at 90d
  const with90dMmas = patients.filter(p => p.mmasScores['90d'] !== undefined);
  const adherent90d = with90dMmas.filter(p => p.mmasScores['90d'] === 0).length;
  const adherenceRate = with90dMmas.length > 0 ? adherent90d / with90dMmas.length : 0;

  const seriousAeCount = patients.filter(p => p.seriousAeReported).length;

  return {
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10),
    cohortSize: patients.length,
    meanBaselineScore: bl.mean,
    mean90dScore: d90.mean,
    meanImprovementPct: improvementPct,
    ci95: [ciLower, ciUpper],
    persistenceRate90d: cohort.persistenceRate['90d'],
    adherenceRate90d: Math.round(adherenceRate * 1000) / 1000,
    aeRate: cohort.aeIncidenceRate,
    seriousAeRate: Math.round((seriousAeCount / patients.length) * 1000) / 1000,
    headline: `${improvementPct}% mean TETRAS-LITE improvement at 90 days`,
  };
}

// Generate once at module load (deterministic via PRNG)
const _patientOutcomes = generatePatientOutcomes();
const _cohortOutcomeData = computeCohortStats(_patientOutcomes);
const _payerEvidenceCard = computePayerCard(_patientOutcomes, _cohortOutcomeData);

export function getPatientOutcomes(): PatientOutcomeRecord[] {
  return _patientOutcomes;
}

export function getCohortOutcomeData(): CohortOutcomeData {
  return _cohortOutcomeData;
}

export function getPayerEvidenceCard(): PayerEvidenceCard {
  return _payerEvidenceCard;
}
```

**Important:** The new type imports (`OutcomeTimepoint`, `PatientOutcomeRecord`, `CohortTimepointStats`, `CohortOutcomeData`, `PayerEvidenceCard`) must be merged into the existing import block at line 6-27 of seed-data.ts — do NOT create a second import from `'./types'`.

## Task 3: Add TETRAS-LITE Screening Results to ET Seed Calls

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/app/lib/seed-data.ts` (within the call generation section, before the cohort generation code)

This ensures Storyboard Step 5 has something to trigger on. Existing ET patient calls need TETRAS-LITE screening results appended to their `screeningResults` arrays.

- [ ] **Step 1: Write test for TETRAS-LITE in seed calls**

Add to `seed-data.test.ts`:

```ts
describe('ET seed calls have TETRAS-LITE screening', () => {
  let calls: CallRecord[];

  beforeAll(() => {
    calls = getAllCalls();
  });

  it('at least one ET patient-support call has TETRAS-LITE screening result', () => {
    const etPatientCalls = calls.filter(
      c => c.therapeuticArea === 'essential-tremor' &&
           c.agentType === 'patient-support' &&
           c.screeningResults?.some(s => s.instrumentId === 'TETRAS-LITE')
    );
    expect(etPatientCalls.length).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);
  });

  it('TETRAS-LITE screening results have valid scores (0-8)', () => {
    const tetrasResults = calls.flatMap(c =>
      (c.screeningResults || []).filter(s => s.instrumentId === 'TETRAS-LITE')
    );
    for (const r of tetrasResults) {
      expect(r.totalScore).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0);
      expect(r.totalScore).toBeLessThanOrEqual(8);
      expect(r.status).toBe('completed');
    }
  });
});
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Add TETRAS-LITE screening results to ET patient calls**

Find the section in `seed-data.ts` where call records are generated and screening results are assigned. For each ET patient-support call (contacts PAT-001, PAT-002, PAT-003), append a completed TETRAS-LITE screening result to the `screeningResults` array:

```ts
// TETRAS-LITE screening result template for ET patients
function makeTetrasScreening(score: number): ScreeningResult {
  const q1Score = Math.min(Math.round(score / 2), 4);
  const q2Score = Math.min(score - q1Score, 4);
  return {
    instrumentId: 'TETRAS-LITE',
    instrumentName: 'TETRAS Performance — Lite Assessment',
    status: 'completed',
    responses: [
      {
        questionIndex: 0,
        questionText: 'Over the past week, how would you rate the severity of your tremor?',
        contactResponse: ['No tremor', 'Slight tremor', 'Moderate tremor', 'Significant tremor', 'Severe tremor'][q1Score],
        scoreValue: q1Score,
        timestamp: 85,
      },
      {
        questionIndex: 1,
        questionText: 'How much does your tremor interfere with daily activities like eating, writing, or dressing?',
        contactResponse: ['No interference', 'Slight interference', 'Moderate interference', 'Significant interference', 'Severe interference'][q2Score],
        scoreValue: q2Score,
        timestamp: 120,
      },
    ],
    totalScore: score,
    maxScore: 8,
    isPositiveScreen: score >= 4,
    clinicalInterpretation: score >= 4
      ? 'Tremor severity indicates suboptimal control — recommend discussion with prescribing physician about dose optimization.'
      : 'Tremor appears well-controlled with current therapy.',
    reportRequired: false,
    reportType: null,
    startedAt: new Date('2026-03-17T10:05:00Z').toISOString(),
    completedAt: new Date('2026-03-17T10:07:00Z').toISOString(),
  };
}
```

After call records are created, add a post-processing step that appends TETRAS-LITE results to ET patient-support calls. Margaret Sullivan (PAT-001) should get score 4/8 (moderate — triggers the "suboptimal" interpretation, which is more interesting for the demo). Other ET patients get scores between 2-5.

The exact insertion point depends on how the existing call generation loop works — locate the section where `screeningResults` is assigned and append the TETRAS-LITE result there.

## Task 4: Storyboard Step 5 — Evidence Capture

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`

This task refactors `STORYBOARD_STEPS` from a module-level const to a dynamic `useMemo`, adds the Evidence Capture step UI, and fixes all hard-coded step bounds.

- [ ] **Step 1: Convert STORYBOARD_STEPS to dynamic useMemo**

Replace the module-level constant at line 164-170:

```ts
const STORYBOARD_STEPS = [
  { id: 'data-drop', label: 'Data Drop' },
  { id: 'agent-config', label: 'Agent Config' },
  { id: 'conversation', label: 'Conversation' },
  { id: 'transcript', label: 'Transcript' },
  { id: 'call-log', label: 'Call Log' },
] as const;
```

with a placeholder constant (the real logic moves into the component):

```ts
const BASE_STORYBOARD_STEPS = [
  { id: 'data-drop', label: 'Data Drop' },
  { id: 'agent-config', label: 'Agent Config' },
  { id: 'conversation', label: 'Conversation' },
  { id: 'transcript', label: 'Transcript' },
  { id: 'call-log', label: 'Call Log' },
];
```

Inside the component, add a `useMemo` that conditionally extends the steps:

```ts
const currentCallHasTetras = useMemo(() => {
  return storyData.call?.screeningResults?.some(
    s => s.instrumentId === 'TETRAS-LITE' && s.status === 'completed'
  ) ?? false;
}, [storyData.call]);

const storyboardSteps = useMemo(() => {
  const steps = [...BASE_STORYBOARD_STEPS];
  if (currentCallHasTetras) {
    steps.push({ id: 'evidence-capture', label: 'Evidence Capture' });
  }
  return steps;
}, [currentCallHasTetras]);
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Add SVG mini-chart component**

Add a function component inside `dashboard/page.tsx` (before the main dashboard component):

```tsx
function EvidenceMiniChart({ data, height = 120, patientScore }: {
  data: CohortTimepointStats[];
  height?: number;
  patientScore?: number;
}) {
  const width = 320;
  const pad = { top: 16, right: 20, bottom: 24, left: 20 };
  const plotW = width - pad.left - pad.right;
  const plotH = height - pad.top - pad.bottom;

  // Y-axis: % improvement from baseline (0% at bottom, max at top)
  const baselineMean = data[0]?.mean ?? 0;
  const improvements = data.map(d => d.timepoint === 'baseline' ? 0 : ((baselineMean - d.mean) / baselineMean) * 100);
  const maxImpr = Math.max(...improvements, 10) * 1.15;

  const x = (i: number) => pad.left + (i / (data.length - 1)) * plotW;
  const y = (pct: number) => pad.top + plotH - (pct / maxImpr) * plotH;

  // CI band path
  const ciUpper = data.map((d, i) => {
    const impr = d.timepoint === 'baseline' ? 0 : ((baselineMean - d.ci95Lower) / baselineMean) * 100;
    return `${x(i)},${y(impr)}`;
  });
  const ciLower = data.map((d, i) => {
    const impr = d.timepoint === 'baseline' ? 0 : ((baselineMean - d.ci95Upper) / baselineMean) * 100;
    return `${x(i)},${y(impr)}`;
  }).reverse();
  const ciPath = `M${ciUpper.join(' L')} L${ciLower.join(' L')} Z`;

  // Mean line points
  const linePoints = improvements.map((pct, i) => `${x(i)},${y(pct)}`).join(' ');

  // Patient dot position (placed at 90d)
  const patientImpr = patientScore !== undefined && baselineMean > 0
    ? ((baselineMean - patientScore) / baselineMean) * 100 : null;

  return (
    <svg viewBox={`0 0 ${width} ${height}`} width="100%" height={height} style={{ overflow: 'visible' }}>
      <path d={ciPath} fill={PX.teal} opacity={0.08} />
      <polyline points={linePoints} fill="none" stroke={PX.teal} strokeWidth={2} />
      {improvements.map((pct, i) => (
        <circle key={i} cx={x(i)} cy={y(pct)} r={4} fill={PX.teal} stroke="white" strokeWidth={1.5} />
      ))}
      {patientImpr !== null && (
        <circle cx={x(3)} cy={y(patientImpr)} r={5} fill={PX.coral} stroke="white" strokeWidth={2}
          style={{ animation: 'evidenceDotFade 0.5s ease-out' }} />
      )}
    </svg>
  );
}
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Add CSS keyframe for dot animation**

Add a `<style>` tag in the dashboard JSX (or append to existing global styles):

```tsx
<style>{`
  @keyframes evidenceDotFade {
    from { opacity: 0; r: 0; }
    to { opacity: 1; r: 5; }
  }
`}</style>
```

Note: Uses opacity + SVG `r` attribute animation instead of CSS `transform` for cross-browser SVG compatibility (CSS transforms on SVG elements fail silently in Safari).

- [ ] **Step 6: Add staggered animation state for Step 5**

Inside the dashboard component, add state and an effect for the Evidence Capture step animations:

```tsx
// Evidence Capture staggered animation
const [evidencePhase, setEvidencePhase] = useState(0); // 0-4 for staggered reveals
const [evidenceCounter, setEvidenceCounter] = useState(436);

useEffect(() => {
  if (storyStep !== storyboardSteps.length - 1 || !currentCallHasTetras) {
    setEvidencePhase(0);
    setEvidenceCounter(436);
    return;
  }
  // Phase 0→1: left card (0ms), 1→2: right chart (800ms), 2→3: dot drop (1500ms), 3→4: counter+headline (2000ms)
  const timers = [
    setTimeout(() => setEvidencePhase(1), 0),
    setTimeout(() => setEvidencePhase(2), 800),
    setTimeout(() => setEvidencePhase(3), 1500),
    setTimeout(() => { setEvidencePhase(4); setEvidenceCounter(437); }, 2000),
  ];
  return () => timers.forEach(clearTimeout);
}, [storyStep, currentCallHasTetras, storyboardSteps.length]);
```

Use `evidencePhase` to conditionally show elements with opacity transitions, and `evidenceCounter` for the animated counter. Each panel element wraps in:

```tsx
<div style={{ opacity: evidencePhase >= N ? 1 : 0, transition: 'opacity 0.4s ease-out' }}>
```

where N is the phase number for that element (1 for left card, 2 for chart, 3 for dot, 4 for counter/headline).

```tsx
{storyStep === 5 && currentCallHasTetras && storyData.call && (() => {
  const tetrasResult = storyData.call.screeningResults?.find(s => s.instrumentId === 'TETRAS-LITE');
  const cohort = getCohortOutcomeData();
  if (!tetrasResult) return null;
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-5 gap-6 animate-fade-in">
      {/* Left: This Call's Contribution (40%) */}
      <div className="md:col-span-2 border bg-white p-5" style={{ borderColor: PX.cardBorder, boxShadow: PX.cardShadow }}>
        <div className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-3" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}>This Call's Contribution</div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
          <span className="text-xs font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded" style={{ backgroundColor: `${PX.teal}15`, color: PX.teal }}>TETRAS-LITE</span>
          <span className="text-xs" style={{ color: PX.textSecondary }}>{tetrasResult.instrumentName}</span>
        </div>
        <div className="text-3xl font-bold mb-1" style={{ color: PX.navy }}>{tetrasResult.totalScore}<span className="text-base font-normal" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}>/{tetrasResult.maxScore}</span></div>
        <div className="text-xs" style={{ color: PX.textSecondary }}>{tetrasResult.clinicalInterpretation}</div>
      </div>
      {/* Right: Population Evidence (60%) */}
      <div className="md:col-span-3 border bg-white p-5" style={{ borderColor: PX.cardBorder, boxShadow: PX.cardShadow }}>
        <div className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-3" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}>Population Evidence</div>
        <EvidenceMiniChart data={cohort.trajectory} patientScore={tetrasResult.totalScore} />
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-3">
          <div className="text-xs font-bold" style={{ color: PX.teal }}>{cohort.totalEnrolled} patients enrolled</div>
          <div className="text-xs" style={{ color: PX.textSecondary }}>
            90-day mean TETRAS improvement: <span className="font-bold" style={{ color: PX.navy }}>{getPayerEvidenceCard().headline.split(' ')[0]}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
})()}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Add contract simulator state**

Inside the main component, add state for the contract simulator:

```ts
const [contractThreshold, setContractThreshold] = useState(30);
const [contractRebate, setContractRebate] = useState(50);

const contractResults = useMemo(() => {
  const patients = getPatientOutcomes();
  const eligible = patients.filter(p =>
    p.tetrasScores.baseline !== undefined && p.tetrasScores['90d'] !== undefined
  );
  const meeting = eligible.filter(p => {
    const bl = p.tetrasScores.baseline!;
    const d90 = p.tetrasScores['90d']!;
    return bl > 0 && ((bl - d90) / bl) >= contractThreshold / 100;
  });
  const pctMeeting = eligible.length > 0 ? meeting.length / eligible.length : 0;
  const rebateExposure = (1 - pctMeeting) * (contractRebate / 100);
  const confidence: 'HIGH' | 'MODERATE' | 'LOW' = pctMeeting > 0.7 ? 'HIGH' : pctMeeting > 0.5 ? 'MODERATE' : 'LOW';
  return {
    eligible: eligible.length,
    meeting: meeting.length,
    notMeeting: eligible.length - meeting.length,
    pctMeeting,
    rebateExposure,
    confidence,
    dropped: patients.length - eligible.length,
  };
}, [contractThreshold, contractRebate]);
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Add full-size SVG trajectory chart component**

Add inside `dashboard/page.tsx` (or extend the existing `EvidenceMiniChart` with a `variant` prop):

```tsx
function EvidenceFullChart({ data, height = 240 }: {
  data: CohortTimepointStats[];
  height?: number;
}) {
  const width = 500;
  const pad = { top: 20, right: 30, bottom: 48, left: 45 };
  const plotW = width - pad.left - pad.right;
  const plotH = height - pad.top - pad.bottom;

  const baselineMean = data[0]?.mean ?? 0;
  const improvements = data.map(d => d.timepoint === 'baseline' ? 0 : ((baselineMean - d.mean) / baselineMean) * 100);
  const maxImpr = Math.ceil(Math.max(...improvements, 10) / 5) * 5 + 5;
  const tpLabels = ['Baseline', '30d', '60d', '90d'];

  const x = (i: number) => pad.left + (i / (data.length - 1)) * plotW;
  const y = (pct: number) => pad.top + plotH - (pct / maxImpr) * plotH;

  // CI band
  const ciUpper = data.map((d, i) => {
    const impr = d.timepoint === 'baseline' ? 0 : ((baselineMean - d.ci95Lower) / baselineMean) * 100;
    return `${x(i)},${y(Math.max(impr, 0))}`;
  });
  const ciLower = data.map((d, i) => {
    const impr = d.timepoint === 'baseline' ? 0 : ((baselineMean - d.ci95Upper) / baselineMean) * 100;
    return `${x(i)},${y(Math.max(impr, 0))}`;
  }).reverse();
  const ciPath = `M${ciUpper.join(' L')} L${ciLower.join(' L')} Z`;
  const linePoints = improvements.map((pct, i) => `${x(i)},${y(pct)}`).join(' ');

  return (
    <svg viewBox={`0 0 ${width} ${height}`} width="100%" height={height}>
      {/* Y-axis grid lines */}
      {Array.from({ length: Math.floor(maxImpr / 10) + 1 }, (_, i) => i * 10).map(pct => (
        <g key={pct}>
          <line x1={pad.left} y1={y(pct)} x2={width - pad.right} y2={y(pct)} stroke={PX.cardBorder} strokeWidth={0.5} />
          <text x={pad.left - 8} y={y(pct) + 3} textAnchor="end" fontSize={9} fill={PX.textMuted}>{pct}%</text>
        </g>
      ))}
      {/* Y-axis label */}
      <text x={12} y={pad.top + plotH / 2} textAnchor="middle" fontSize={9} fill={PX.textMuted} transform={`rotate(-90, 12, ${pad.top + plotH / 2})`}>% Improvement</text>
      {/* CI band */}
      <path d={ciPath} fill={PX.teal} opacity={0.08} />
      {/* Mean line */}
      <polyline points={linePoints} fill="none" stroke={PX.teal} strokeWidth={2.5} strokeLinejoin="round" />
      {/* Data points + labels */}
      {data.map((d, i) => (
        <g key={d.timepoint}>
          <circle cx={x(i)} cy={y(improvements[i])} r={5} fill={PX.teal} stroke="white" strokeWidth={2} />
          {i > 0 && <text x={x(i)} y={y(improvements[i]) - 12} textAnchor="middle" fontSize={11} fontWeight="bold" fill={PX.navy}>{improvements[i].toFixed(0)}%</text>}
          <text x={x(i)} y={pad.top + plotH + 16} textAnchor="middle" fontSize={10} fill={PX.textSecondary}>{tpLabels[i]}</text>
          <text x={x(i)} y={pad.top + plotH + 30} textAnchor="middle" fontSize={8} fill={PX.textMuted}>n={d.n}</text>
        </g>
      ))}
    </svg>
  );
}
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Add Outcomes & Evidence tab content**

After the Performance tab section and before the Implementation tab section, add the new tab render block:

```tsx
{activeTab === 'outcomes-evidence' && (() => {
  const cohort = getCohortOutcomeData();
  const card = getPayerEvidenceCard();
  return (
    <div className="space-y-6 animate-fade-in">
      <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: PX.textSecondary }}>
        Real-world evidence generated from hub interactions. TETRAS-LITE outcome trajectories, therapy persistence, and payer-ready evidence summaries — powered by screening data collected during routine patient support calls.
      </p>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
        {/* Panel 1: TETRAS-LITE Cohort Trajectory */}
        <div className="border bg-white p-6" style={{ borderColor: PX.cardBorder, boxShadow: PX.cardShadow }}>
          <div className="text-sm font-bold mb-4" style={{ color: PX.navy }}>TETRAS-LITE Score Trajectory — ELEX Cohort</div>
          <EvidenceFullChart data={cohort.trajectory} />
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-4">
            <span className="text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded" style={{ backgroundColor: `${PX.teal}15`, color: PX.teal }}>
              Baseline: {cohort.trajectory[0]?.mean.toFixed(1)}/8
            </span>
            {cohort.trajectory.slice(1).map(tp => {
              const impr = ((cohort.trajectory[0].mean - tp.mean) / cohort.trajectory[0].mean * 100).toFixed(0);
              return (
                <span key={tp.timepoint} className="text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded" style={{ backgroundColor: `${PX.teal}15`, color: PX.teal }}>
                  {tp.timepoint}: {impr}% improved
                </span>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Panel 2: Persistence Waterfall */}
        <div className="border bg-white p-6" style={{ borderColor: PX.cardBorder, boxShadow: PX.cardShadow }}>
          <div className="text-sm font-bold mb-4" style={{ color: PX.navy }}>Therapy Persistence — ELEX Cohort</div>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {[
              { label: 'Enrolled', pct: 1, n: cohort.totalEnrolled },
              { label: '30 days', pct: cohort.persistenceRate['30d'], n: Math.round(cohort.totalEnrolled * cohort.persistenceRate['30d']) },
              { label: '60 days', pct: cohort.persistenceRate['60d'], n: Math.round(cohort.totalEnrolled * cohort.persistenceRate['60d']) },
              { label: '90 days', pct: cohort.persistenceRate['90d'], n: Math.round(cohort.totalEnrolled * cohort.persistenceRate['90d']) },
            ].map((row, i) => (
              <div key={row.label}>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                  <span className="text-xs font-medium" style={{ color: PX.textPrimary }}>{row.label}</span>
                  <span className="text-xs font-bold" style={{ color: PX.teal }}>{(row.pct * 100).toFixed(0)}% · n={row.n}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="h-3 rounded-full bg-[#E2E7EA] overflow-hidden">
                  <div className="h-full rounded-full transition-all" style={{ width: `${row.pct * 100}%`, backgroundColor: PX.teal, opacity: 1 - i * 0.15 }} />
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div className="mt-4 pt-3 border-t" style={{ borderColor: PX.cardBorder }}>
            <div className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-2" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}>Discontinuation Reasons (n={cohort.totalEnrolled - Math.round(cohort.totalEnrolled * cohort.persistenceRate['90d'])})</div>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-1">
              {[
                { reason: 'Cost barrier', pct: 34 },
                { reason: 'Side effects', pct: 28 },
                { reason: 'Insufficient efficacy', pct: 22 },
                { reason: 'Other', pct: 16 },
              ].map(r => (
                <div key={r.reason} className="text-[10px] flex justify-between" style={{ color: PX.textSecondary }}>
                  <span>{r.reason}</span><span className="font-bold">{r.pct}%</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Panel 3: Payer Evidence Card */}
        <div className="border bg-white p-6" style={{ borderColor: PX.cardBorder, boxShadow: PX.cardShadow, borderLeft: `4px solid ${PX.teal}` }}>
          <div className="text-sm font-bold mb-1" style={{ color: PX.navy }}>Real-World Evidence Summary — ELEX (Euloxacaltenamide)</div>
          <div className="text-[10px] mb-4" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}>Generated from Vi Operate Hub Data · {card.generatedAt}</div>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            {[
              { label: 'COHORT SIZE', value: `${card.cohortSize} patients` },
              { label: 'MEAN TETRAS IMPROVEMENT (90D)', value: `${card.meanImprovementPct}% (95% CI: ${card.ci95[0]}–${card.ci95[1]}%)` },
              { label: '90-DAY PERSISTENCE', value: `${(card.persistenceRate90d * 100).toFixed(0)}%` },
              { label: 'ADHERENCE (MMAS-4 HIGH)', value: `${(card.adherenceRate90d * 100).toFixed(0)}%` },
              { label: 'AE INCIDENCE', value: `${(card.aeRate * 100).toFixed(1)}%` },
              { label: 'SERIOUS AE', value: `${(card.seriousAeRate * 100).toFixed(1)}%` },
            ].map(m => (
              <div key={m.label}>
                <div className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-1" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}>{m.label}</div>
                <div className="text-sm font-bold" style={{ color: PX.textPrimary }}>{m.value}</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div className="text-[9px] mt-4 pt-3 border-t" style={{ color: PX.textMuted, borderColor: PX.cardBorder }}>
            Data source: Validated TETRAS-LITE and MMAS-4 screening instruments administered via Vi Operate patient support hub during routine engagement calls.
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Panel 4: Contract Simulator */}
        <div className="border bg-white p-6" style={{ borderColor: PX.cardBorder, boxShadow: PX.cardShadow }}>
          <div className="text-sm font-bold mb-4" style={{ color: PX.navy }}>Outcomes-Based Contract Simulator</div>

          {/* Sliders */}
          <div className="space-y-4 mb-6">
            <div>
              <div className="flex justify-between mb-1">
                <span className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}>Required TETRAS Improvement</span>
                <span className="text-xs font-bold" style={{ color: PX.teal }}>{contractThreshold}%</span>
              </div>
              <input type="range" min={20} max={50} step={1} value={contractThreshold}
                onChange={e => setContractThreshold(Number(e.target.value))}
                className="w-full h-1.5 rounded-full appearance-none cursor-pointer"
                style={{ background: `linear-gradient(to right, ${PX.teal} ${((contractThreshold - 20) / 30) * 100}%, ${PX.cardBorder} ${((contractThreshold - 20) / 30) * 100}%)` }} />
              <div className="flex justify-between text-[9px]" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}><span>20%</span><span>50%</span></div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div className="flex justify-between mb-1">
                <span className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}>Rebate if Threshold Not Met</span>
                <span className="text-xs font-bold" style={{ color: PX.teal }}>{contractRebate}%</span>
              </div>
              <input type="range" min={25} max={75} step={5} value={contractRebate}
                onChange={e => setContractRebate(Number(e.target.value))}
                className="w-full h-1.5 rounded-full appearance-none cursor-pointer"
                style={{ background: `linear-gradient(to right, ${PX.teal} ${((contractRebate - 25) / 50) * 100}%, ${PX.cardBorder} ${((contractRebate - 25) / 50) * 100}%)` }} />
              <div className="flex justify-between text-[9px]" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}><span>25%</span><span>75%</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Results */}
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div>
              <div className="text-xs mb-1" style={{ color: PX.textSecondary }}>
                Patients meeting threshold: <span className="font-bold" style={{ color: PX.navy }}>{contractResults.meeting} / {contractResults.eligible} ({(contractResults.pctMeeting * 100).toFixed(1)}%)</span>
              </div>
              <div className="h-3 rounded-full overflow-hidden flex" style={{ backgroundColor: PX.cardBorder }}>
                <div className="h-full" style={{ width: `${contractResults.pctMeeting * 100}%`, backgroundColor: PX.teal }} />
                <div className="h-full" style={{ width: `${(1 - contractResults.pctMeeting) * 100}%`, backgroundColor: PX.coral }} />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-xs" style={{ color: PX.textSecondary }}>
              Patients NOT meeting threshold: <span className="font-bold">{contractResults.notMeeting} / {contractResults.eligible} ({((1 - contractResults.pctMeeting) * 100).toFixed(1)}%)</span>
            </div>
            <div className="text-xs" style={{ color: PX.textSecondary }}>
              Estimated rebate exposure: <span className="font-bold" style={{ color: PX.navy }}>{(contractResults.rebateExposure * 100).toFixed(1)}% of gross revenue</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
              <span className="text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded" style={{
                backgroundColor: contractResults.confidence === 'HIGH' ? `${PX.success}15` : contractResults.confidence === 'MODERATE' ? `${PX.warning}15` : `${PX.error}15`,
                color: contractResults.confidence === 'HIGH' ? PX.success : contractResults.confidence === 'MODERATE' ? PX.warning : PX.error,
              }}>{contractResults.confidence} CONFIDENCE</span>
            </div>
            <div className="text-[9px] mt-1" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}>
              {contractResults.dropped} patients discontinued before 90-day assessment — not included in threshold analysis.
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="text-[9px] mt-4 pt-3 border-t" style={{ color: PX.textMuted, borderColor: PX.cardBorder }}>
            Adjust thresholds to model contract terms. Data from hub-collected TETRAS-LITE scores.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* DEE placeholder */}
      <div className="border bg-white p-4 text-center" style={{ borderColor: PX.cardBorder, boxShadow: PX.cardShadow }}>
        <span className="text-xs" style={{ color: PX.textMuted }}>Seizure frequency reduction data available for Relutrigine (DEE) cohort — contact Vi for configuration.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
})()}
```

- [ ] **Step 6: Build and verify**

```bash
cd frontend && npm run build
```

Expected: Build succeeds, no TypeScript errors.

- [ ] **Step 7: Commit**

```bash
git add frontend/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
git commit -m "feat(dashboard): add Outcomes & Evidence tab with trajectory, persistence, payer card, and contract simulator"
```

---

## Task 6: Visual Polish and Manual Testing

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx` (minor adjustments)

- [ ] **Step 1: Run the dev server and test the full flow**

```bash
cd frontend && npm run dev
```

Open http://localhost:3000, log in, and test:

1. Agent Storyboard → select an ET patient scenario → walk through all steps → verify Step 5 ("Evidence Capture") appears with chart and score
2. Storyboard with a DEE patient scenario → verify Step 5 does NOT appear
3. Outcomes & Evidence tab → verify all 4 panels render
4. Contract Simulator → drag both sliders → verify numbers update instantly
5. Tab badge shows "437"

- [ ] **Step 2: Fix any visual issues**

Adjust spacing, font sizes, colors, chart proportions as needed. Follow PX design tokens. No functional changes — visual polish only.

- [ ] **Step 3: Run all tests**

```bash
cd frontend && npx vitest run
```

Expected: All tests pass.

- [ ] **Step 4: Final commit**

```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "polish: visual adjustments for Evidence Engine feature"
```
